plantDescription: The rose is a woody perennial flowering plant.
plantFunFact: Rose petals have been used to make perfumes and rosewater for a very long time.

plantDescription: Tulips are spring-blooming perennials that grow from bulbs.
plantFunFact: Tulips can keep growing a little even after they’re cut and placed in a vase.

plantDescription: Tomato is a red or yellowish fruit with a juicy pulp, used as a vegetable in cooking.
plantFunFact: Tomatoes are botanically fruits, even though they’re often used like vegetables.

plantDescription: Lavender is a fragrant herb known for its beautiful purple flowers.
plantFunFact: Lavender’s scent comes from natural oils in its leaves and flowers.

plantDescription: Basil is a culinary herb known for its aromatic leaves.
plantFunFact: Pinching off the top leaves can encourage basil to grow bushier.

plantDescription: Sunflower is a tall, annual plant with large, bright yellow flowers.
plantFunFact: Young sunflowers can track the sun as it moves across the sky.

plantDescription: Ficus is a popular houseplant known for its glossy green leaves.
plantFunFact: Ficus plants are popular indoor trees and can grow tall with enough light.

plantDescription: Lilies are flowering plants with large, colorful petals.
plantFunFact: Some lilies have a strong fragrance that helps attract pollinators.

plantDescription: Peppers are vegetables known for their spicy or sweet flavor.
plantFunFact: Peppers come in many shapes and heat levels—even within the same family.

plantDescription: Daisies are small, white flowers with a yellow center.
plantFunFact: Many “daisy” flowers close their petals at night and open again in the morning.

plantDescription: Mint is a fragrant herb used in cooking and beverages.
plantFunFact: Mint spreads quickly—many gardeners grow it in pots to keep it contained.

plantDescription: Cacti are succulent plants adapted to arid environments.
plantFunFact: Many cacti store water in their stems to survive long dry periods.

plantDescription: Lemon is a citrus fruit known for its sour taste.
plantFunFact: Lemon trees can sometimes have flowers and fruit on them at the same time.

plantDescription: Orchids are exotic flowers known for their beauty and diversity.
plantFunFact: Orchids are one of the largest plant families, with thousands of species.

plantDescription: Cucumber is a refreshing vegetable often used in salads.
plantFunFact: Cucumbers are made up of mostly water, which is why they taste so refreshing.

plantDescription: Pansies are colorful, cool-weather flowers with distinctive markings.
plantFunFact: Pansies are known for their face-like petal patterns and cool-weather blooms.

plantDescription: Carrot is a root vegetable known for its orange color and sweet taste.
plantFunFact: Carrots weren’t always orange—older varieties could be purple or yellow.

plantDescription: Aloe vera is a succulent plant known for its soothing properties.
plantFunFact: Aloe gel is often used in skincare products because it feels soothing.

plantDescription: Cherry blossoms are delicate, pink flowers that bloom in spring.
plantFunFact: Cherry blossoms typically bloom for a short time before the petals fall.

plantDescription: Lettuce is a leafy green vegetable used in salads and sandwiches.
plantFunFact: Lettuce grows best in cooler weather and can bolt (flower) in heat.
